response:
Claude for Excel lets you switch between Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, and Sonnet 4.6. To change the model, open the Claude add‑in in Excel, click the model selector (usually at the top of the panel), and choose the desired model. Switching to a higher‑capacity model like Opus may help avoid the "Context Window Exceeded" error. If you continue to hit limits, review the context‑window guidance in the article "How can I check connectivity to the Claude API?" for additional tips.

For further assistance, you can contact Support via the Help Center message icon in the bottom right, or click your initials in the lower left corner of the Claude Console and select "Get help."
justification: Used model list from Section 5 (Use Claude For Excel FAQ) which states available models. Provided support contact method from Section 1. No direct doc on increasing limits, so advised to switch models and consult related guidance.
